Metadata.title: Morpheus
Metadata.description: Software risk assessment and homologation platform

LoginPage.title: Morpheus
LoginPage.subtitle: Sign in with your corporate account
LoginPage.tenantSlugHint: Use that organization's own credentials. Super-admins with access to other organizations can switch context from the menu selector after signing in to their home organization.
LoginPage.genericError: Could not sign in. Check your details and try again.

Approvals.title: Pending approvals
Approvals.subtitle: Workflow steps waiting on your decision.
Approvals.loadError: Could not load your pending approvals.
Approvals.vendorComplianceReminder: Self-declared by the requester - confirm the document exists outside the system before approving.
Approvals.bulkDialogSubtitle: The same decision will be applied to every step below.
Approvals.bulkSkipHint: "Skip step" only works for the selected ones that are optional - the rest show up as a failure in the result.
Approvals.bulkDecisionPartial: {successCount} decisions recorded, {failureCount} failed (e.g. you requested it yourself, or it was already decided by someone else).

TechnicalOpinions.title: Technical opinions
TechnicalOpinions.subtitle: Opinions already issued - yours, or all in the tenant if you have approval permission.
TechnicalOpinions.downloadError: Could not download the technical opinion.
TechnicalOpinions.viewError: Could not open the technical opinion.
TechnicalOpinions.empty: No opinions found for the applied filters.

Faq.title: Help / FAQ
Faq.subtitle: Main operating points of the system, organized by topic.

assessments.title: Assessments
assessments.q1Answer: It's the homologation process a software goes through before it can be used in the company: a security questionnaire is answered, scored against the configured risk matrix, and moves through the approval workflow defined by the organization.
assessments.q2Question: How do I start a new assessment?
assessments.q2Answer: On the Assessments screen, use the new assessment button, fill in the software details and answer the questionnaire. Once submitted, it automatically enters the approval workflow.
assessments.q3Question: What does each final classification mean (Homologado, Rejeitado, Aguardando Ajustes)?
assessments.q3Answer: It's the outcome recorded on the technical opinion issued at the end of the workflow: "Homologado" clears the software for use, "Rejeitado" blocks it, and "Aguardando Ajustes" requests fixes before a new review.

approvals.title: Approvals
approvals.q1Answer: It depends on the workflow configured under Administration > Workflow - it usually goes through one or more approver roles in sequence, based on the calculated risk score.
approvals.q2Question: What happens if a workflow step is rejected?
approvals.q2Answer: The assessment receives the corresponding terminal decision and a technical opinion is generated automatically recording the outcome. The same assessment cannot be resubmitted - a new one has to be opened.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.q1Answer: It's the list of software in use across the organization - both items that came from an approved homologation (added automatically) and items entered manually.
inventory.q2Question: Does every inventory item have a linked technical opinion?
inventory.q2Answer: No. Only items originated from an approved homologation have a linked opinion - manually created items show "-" in the opinion field.
inventory.q3Question: How do I see the technical opinion linked to an inventory item?
inventory.q3Answer: On the item's detail screen, or in the "Opinion" column of the list - the link takes you straight to the opinion, already filtered on the Technical Opinions screen.

technicalOpinions.title: Technical opinions
technicalOpinions.q1Answer: It's the numbered PDF document generated automatically when an assessment reaches a terminal decision, including a QR code and hash for authenticity verification.
technicalOpinions.q2Question: Who can see other people's technical opinions?
technicalOpinions.q2Answer: Anyone with permission to view all assessments or approve assessments sees every opinion in the organization. Everyone else only sees opinions for assessments they requested themselves.
technicalOpinions.q3Question: How do I verify that an opinion is authentic?
technicalOpinions.q3Answer: The QR code and hash printed on the PDF point to the public verification page by opinion number, no login required.

account.title: Account and organization
account.q1Answer: Only users with platform permission (super-admin) see the organization switcher at the top of the sidebar - everyone else is restricted to their own organization.
account.q2Question: How do roles and permissions work?
account.q2Answer: Each user has one or more roles, and each role groups a set of permissions (e.g. approve assessments, manage users). Roles are managed under Administration > Roles.
account.q3Question: How do I change the language or theme (light/dark)?
account.q3Answer: Use the controls at the bottom of the sidebar, available on every screen of the system.

Admin.title: Administration
Admin.subtitle: Platform administrative settings and records.

Inventory.title: Software inventory
Inventory.subtitle: Homologated software assets in use across the organization.
Inventory.homologationDateImmutableHint: Historical fact from the original homologation - not editable after creation.
Inventory.vendorComplianceHint: Required even for manual entries - declared by whoever registers the item.
Inventory.vendorComplianceInheritedHint: Inherited from the homologation assessment - editable only by reopening the original assessment.
Inventory.documentationLinksHint: E.g.: Jira epic, Swagger/OpenAPI, Postman collection - mostly useful for API Integration assets.

dashboard.overdueReviewsHint: Active items whose review date has already passed.
dashboard.dueSoonReviews: Reviews due in the next 30 days
dashboard.dueSoonReviewsHint: Active items with a review scheduled for the next 30 days.

AdminQuestionnaire.title: Questionnaire
AdminQuestionnaire.subtitle: Categories, questions, options, and links to compliance controls.

question.optionsRequired: Single-choice or multi-choice questions need at least one option.
question.optionDeleteConfirmDescription: Options already used in assessment answers cannot be removed - deactivate the question instead.
question.noControlsAvailable: All available controls are already linked.

AdminRiskMatrix.title: Risk matrix
AdminRiskMatrix.subtitle: Risk configs, probability and impact levels, classifications, and the decision grid.
AdminRiskMatrix.loadError: Could not load the risk matrices.

config.fieldMinApprovalScoreHint: 0 to 5 scale - minimum overall score for automatic/recommended approval.
config.activateConfirmDescription: Activating this matrix deactivates any other one in the tenant. The matrix needs at least one probability level, one impact level, and one classification.

level.deleteConfirmDescription: Levels already used in calculated risk results cannot be removed.

classification.title: Classifications
classification.deleteConfirmDescription: Classifications already used in calculated risk results cannot be removed.

heatmap.title: Decision grid (probability x impact)
heatmap.needsLevelsAndClassifications: Add at least one probability level, one impact level, and one classification to build the grid.

AdminWorkflow.title: Workflow
AdminWorkflow.subtitle: Approval workflow definitions and their steps.

step.title: Steps
step.noRolesAvailable: No roles set up in this tenant yet - create a role before adding steps.
step.fieldRequiresLgpd: Only enters the flow if LGPD applies
step.deleteConfirmDescription: Steps already used in workflow executions cannot be removed.

AdminUsers.title: Users
AdminUsers.subtitle: Tenant users and their roles.
AdminUsers.replicateRolesToggle: Replicate roles from an existing user
AdminUsers.cannotDeactivateSelf: You can't deactivate your own account.

AdminRoles.title: Roles
AdminRoles.subtitle: Access roles and each one's permission set.
AdminRoles.replicateToggle: Replicate permissions from an existing role
AdminRoles.deleteConfirmDescription: This action can't be undone. Roles in use (assigned to users or responsible for workflow steps) can't be deleted.

AdminSettings.title: Platform settings
AdminSettings.subtitle: Branding and numbering used in the technical opinion.
AdminSettings.logoHint: PNG or JPEG, up to 2MB. Shown in the PDF technical opinion header.
AdminSettings.logoUploadError: Could not upload the logo. Check the format (PNG/JPEG) and size (up to 2MB).
AdminSettings.fieldSecurityTeamNameHint: Shown as the opinion's author. Without a value, a generic label is used.

tabs.comingSoonDescription: This setting is still being built — it lands in a future step of the plan.

stats.slaBreachesHint: Workflow steps awaiting a decision past their deadline.

NewAssessment.hasRiskAnalysisLabel: Does the vendor have a documented risk analysis (ART)?
NewAssessment.hasInfoSecClauseLabel: Does the vendor have a signed information security clause?
